title: Asuka best or trash waifu
wikitext:
[]: Asuka - best or trash waifu             Quote Post by Asugran233 » Sat Jan 29, 2022 5:28 am I'm curious whether Asuka is best waifu or trash I like Asuka and I want to know do you like her or do you hate her This is my arguments why like Asuka -Looks like Good -Her behavior is extreme -She's like red (like me) -She always knows best

[]: Re: Asuka - best or trash waifu             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Sat Jan 29, 2022 3:04 pm Asuka is written so well that she's like a person to me, so I find it weird to categorize her on an upvote/downvote basis. And no she does not, as no one does, always know best. The psychological and social conflict she experiences as the series progresses stems from that fact.

[]: Re: Asuka - best or trash waifu             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Jan 29, 2022 5:43 pm Best waifu by all accounts is Maya Ibuki, and Ritsuko would be lucky to have her. Everyone else needs major therapy.

[]: Re: Asuka - best or trash waifu             Quote Post by ::KL7:: » Sun Jan 30, 2022 12:29 am Rei was always my favorite until the last movie. Now Asuka is my waifu and my favorite Eva character ever.

[]: Re: Asuka - best or trash waifu             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Jan 30, 2022 6:39 am I pray to Asuka every night before bed, thanking her for the life I've been given. Asuka is love. Asuka is life.

[]: Re: Asuka - best or trash waifu             Quote Post by nerv bae » Mon Jan 31, 2022 5:19 pm Asugran233 wrote: I'm curious whether Asuka is best waifu

[]: Re: Asuka - best or trash waifu             Quote Post by Sentient Evangelion » Thu Mar 03, 2022 11:45 pm SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Asuka - best or trash waifu             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Mar 04, 2022 8:01 am Best, and questioning it is already a sin.

[]: Re: Asuka - best or trash waifu             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Fri May 20, 2022 7:55 am Why not both? Can't we accept "Best And Trash Waifu?"

[]: Re: Asuka - best or trash waifu             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Thu May 26, 2022 7:01 am It depends on the Asuka...

[]: Re: Asuka - best or trash waifu             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Thu May 26, 2022 8:23 pm BernardoCairo wrote: It depends on the Asuka...

[]: Re: Asuka - best or trash waifu             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Sat May 28, 2022 10:18 am Yeah, precisely. Fundamentally different characters. Shikinami is like a crappy version of Taiga, while Soryu is an actual realized character. The best one

[]: Re: Asuka - best or trash waifu             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Sat May 28, 2022 9:33 pm BernardoCairo wrote: Yeah, precisely. Fundamentally different characters. Shikinami is like a crappy version of Taiga, while Soryu is an actual realized character. The best one

[]: Re: Asuka - best or trash waifu             Quote Post by Natalie the Cat » Wed Jun 29, 2022 10:45 am Ritsuko waifu no.1, all others no.2.

[]: Re: Asuka - best or trash waifu             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Sun Jul 03, 2022 9:46 pm Natalie the Cat wrote: Ritsuko waifu no.1, all others no.2.

[]: Re: Asuka - best or trash waifu             Quote Post by bloopymicrowave » Thu Sep 29, 2022 9:29 pm Tbh yeah, she was my favorite since her reveal (started on the anime). Imo here is my ranking for the Asukas: Manga > Anime > Rebuild love all three though, as I do any character in this series.

[]: Re: Asuka - best or trash waifu             Quote Post by Angel » Sun Oct 30, 2022 11:17 pm Asuka cannot be best because that honor belongs to Rei.

[]: Re: Asuka - best or trash waifu             Quote Post by Blockio » Wed Nov 02, 2022 1:30 pm Let's not post cheap waifu war bait, shall we?
